name: feature-memory
description: Maintains feature-level memory for software repos. Compiles project knowledge into persistent, interlinked markdown docs with source maps, dual developer+product changelogs, tag-filtered changelog viewer, relationship diagrams, and confidence tracking. Hooks into the agent lifecycle to keep docs current as code changes.

skills.name: feature-memory
skills.description: Maintains Feature Memory docs for changed source files. Keeps product summaries, engineering summaries, source maps, relationships, and changelogs current.

skills.name: feature-memory-init
skills.description: Initializes Feature Memory in the current project. Creates the docs structure, config, changelog viewer, and event log. Scans the codebase to detect features.

skills.name: feature-memory-backfill
skills.description: Backfills the Feature Memory changelog from git history. Maps commits to features and appends structured entries to changelog.json, then refreshes the viewer.

skills.name: feature-memory-changelog-refresh
skills.description: Re-infers and replaces tags for ALL existing changelog entries. No git re-scan — uses stored paths and commit messages.

skills.name: feature-memory-changelog-clear
skills.description: Clears all entries from changelog.json without touching feature .md docs. Changelog can be repopulated with backfill.

skills.name: feature-memory-changelog-purge-md
skills.description: Removes changelog entries whose every path is a .md file (doc-only commits that don't represent feature changes).

skills.name: feature-memory-changelog-dedup
skills.description: Merges duplicate changelog entries that share the same git commit and feature into one. Unions paths and tags, prefers backfill-quality summaries over hook-generated ones.
